16.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

16.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
16.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
17.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
17.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

17.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
17.kj: abide, accomplish, [idiom] be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, [idiom] be dim, endure, [idiom] enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, [id

17.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
17.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

17.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
17.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

17.gl: properly, to prostrate; hence, to break down, either (literally) by violence, or (figuratively) by confusion and fear
17.kj: abolish, affright, be (make) afraid, amaze, beat down, discourage, (cause to) dismay, go down, scare, terrify.

17.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
17.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

18.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
18.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

18.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
18.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
18.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

18.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
18.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
18.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

18.gl: copper, hence, something made of that metal, i.e. coin, a fetter; figuratively, base (as compared with gold or silver)
18.kj: brasen, brass, chain, copper, fetter (of brass), filthiness, steel.

18.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
18.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
18.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

18.gl: a fortification, castle, or fortified city; figuratively, a defender
18.dv: also (in plural) feminine (Daniel 11:l5) מִבְצָרָה; from H1219 (בָּצַר);

19.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
19.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

19.gl: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
19.kj: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.

19.gl: to feed on; figuratively, to consume; by implication, to battle (as destruction)
19.kj: devour, eat, [idiom] ever, fight(-ing), overcome, prevail, (make) war(-ring).

19.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
19.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
I, (as for) me, mine, myself, we, [idiom] which, [idiom] who.
